title: GMS Week 10 - FIRMLY POISED!
summary:
Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 13/03/2023
Image reference: 2023-03-13_gms-week-10-firmly-poised_img1.jpg
Recycling markets remain firmly poised for another week, following a stunning resurgence by theBangladeshi market (in particular) that leaves them atop the price rankings board. Indeed, levels close to and even over USD 600/LDT are now being regularly presented on various vessels and this is inducing more Ship Owners to sell their vessels, especially as freight rates in the dry bulk and container sectors are failing to improve sufficiently for Owners to keep holding onto their aging tonnage. Cape rates have come back this past week, leaving question marks over whether the larger LDT dry units will hit recycling markets any time soon.
